hero.headline: We transform your business complexity into systems that simply work.
hero.description: Web development, servers, cybersecurity, automation, and artificial intelligence. Everything you need to compete with technology, in a single team dedicated to your business.

items.title: Hiring an internal IT team is expensive
items.description: A single developer, a sysadmin, and a security specialist can exceed $8,000/month in salary costs.

items.title: Uncommitted freelancers
items.description: They respond when they want, disappear mid-project, and don't understand your business. Every new freelancer starts from scratch.

items.title: Technology advances, your company falls behind
items.description: While your competition automates processes and uses AI, you're still solving everything manually and losing hours every week.

items.title: Undetected vulnerabilities
items.description: Without a security team, your website, emails, and customer data are exposed. An attack could cost you your entire business.

howItWorks.title: From zero to IT team
howItWorks.description: A simple and transparent process. No lock-in contracts, no surprises.

steps.title: Initial assessment
steps.description: We analyze your current digital ecosystem: website, servers, email, security, processes, and tools. We identify vulnerabilities and improvement opportunities.

steps.title: Custom plan
steps.description: We design a roadmap tailored to your company, your goals, and your budget. Each plan is built around what you actually need.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.description: We become your IT team. We manage your infrastructure, resolve incidents, and implement improvements. You grow, we take care of the rest.

services.headline: Everything your company needs, in a single team
services.description: Each service can be contracted separately or as part of a comprehensive plan. We adapt the solution to your reality.

items.title: 360° Consulting
items.description: Comprehensive assessment of your digital ecosystem. We identify opportunities, design the strategy, and support you through execution.

items.quote: We used to spend on a freelance developer, another for the server, and another for email. With Enigma we have everything integrated, with better quality and for less than what we were paying before.
items.name: Carlos Mendoza

items.quote: The AI agent they implemented handles 70% of our customer inquiries automatically. Our sales team now focuses on closing deals, not answering the same questions.

items.quote: After the security audit, they found critical vulnerabilities we didn't know we had. They saved us from a serious problem. Now we sleep soundly knowing someone is protecting our infrastructure.

faq.question: Are there lock-in contracts?
faq.answer: No. All our plans are monthly and you can cancel at any time. We believe the best way to keep you is by providing excellent service, not by tying you down with contracts.

faq.question: Can I change plans later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect in the next billing cycle.

faq.question: What happens to my website and data if I cancel?
faq.answer: Everything is yours. We provide full access to your website, servers, email, and any development we've done. We don't hold anything back.

faq.question: Are prices the same for Peru and Spain?
faq.answer: Prices are adapted to the local market. Book an assessment and we'll send you a personalized proposal based on your location and needs.

faq.question: Can I hire individual services without a plan?
faq.answer: Yes. All our services can be contracted independently. Plans are the most convenient option if you need multiple services, but it's not mandatory.

clientsPage.title: The machine that drives
clientsPage.description: Each rotor represents a company that trusts Enigma as their IT team. Together, we make the machine run.

aboutPage.heroDescription: Over 5 years helping companies compete with technology. From Lima and Barcelona, for all of Latin America and Spain.
aboutPage.historyTitle: From digital agency to comprehensive IT team
aboutPage.historyP1: Enigma was born in 2019 in Lima, Peru, as a web development and hosting agency. Over time, our clients started asking for more: servers, security, email, automations.
aboutPage.historyP2: We realized that SMEs don't need separate vendors solving isolated problems. They need a complete team that understands their business and manages all their technology comprehensively.
aboutPage.historyP3: Today we operate from Lima and Barcelona, serving companies across Latin America and Spain, offering everything an internal IT department would—but without the costs of having one on payroll.

timeline.title: Enigma is born
timeline.description: We founded Enigma Developers in Lima, Peru, as a web development and hosting agency.

timeline.title: Pandemic growth
timeline.description: The forced digitalization from COVID brought us dozens of companies that needed an urgent online presence.

timeline.title: Service expansion
timeline.description: We added cybersecurity, cloud server administration, and comprehensive technology consulting.

timeline.title: European presence
timeline.description: We opened operations in Barcelona, Spain, serving companies on both continents.

timeline.title: The automation era
timeline.description: We integrated automation services with Zapier, Make, and n8n to optimize our clients' processes.

timeline.title: Artificial intelligence
timeline.description: We launched our custom AI agents service, trained with each business's data.

timeline.title: Your IT team
timeline.description: We evolved to the subscription model: being the complete IT department for the companies that trust us.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.intro: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through our contact and assessment forms:
items: Full name
Email address
Phone number
Company name
Message or description of needs
sections.outro: Additionally, our website may automatically collect browsing data such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.intro: The data collected is used exclusively for:
items: Responding to inquiries and contact requests
Managing digital assessment requests
Sending commercial proposals related to our services
Improving the browsing experience on our website
Complying with applicable legal obligations

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.text: The processing of your data is based on your express consent when completing our forms, as well as the legitimate interest of Enigma Developers S.A.C. to manage commercial relationships. For clients, the legal basis includes the execution of the service contract.

sections.title: 5. Data retention
sections.text: Personal data will be retained as long as a commercial relationship exists or for the time necessary to fulfill the stated purposes. Once the relationship ends, data will be retained for the legal periods established by applicable Peruvian and/or European regulations.

sections.title: 6. Data sharing
sections.intro: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except in the following cases:
items: Technology service providers necessary for operations (hosting, email, web analytics)
Compliance with legal obligations or requests from competent authorities
With your prior and express consent

sections.title: 7. Security
sections.text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure. This includes the use of encrypted connections (SSL/TLS), access controls, and internal information security policies.

sections.title: 8. Data subject rights
sections.intro: In accordance with Law No. 29733 (Peru's Personal Data Protection Law) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union, you have the right to:
items: Access your personal data
Rectify inaccurate or incomplete data
Request deletion of your data
Object to the processing of your data
Request data portability
Revoke your consent at any time
sections.outro: To exercise these rights, send an email to hello@enigmasac.com indicating your request and identification details.

sections.title: 9. Cookies
sections.text: This website may use its own and third-party cookies to improve the browsing experience and collect usage statistics. You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies at any time.

sections.title: 10. Modifications
sections.text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Modifications will be published on this same page with the date of the last update.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.text: If you have questions about this privacy policy or about the processing of your personal data, you can contact us at:

sections.title: 2. Purpose
sections.text: These terms regulate the use of the enigmasac.com website and the contracting of services offered by Enigma Developers S.A.C., including web development, server and cloud administration, corporate email, cybersecurity, automation, artificial intelligence agents, and technology consulting.

sections.title: 3. Acceptance
sections.text: Access to and use of this website, as well as the contracting of any of our services, implies full acceptance of these terms and conditions. If you disagree with any of them, we recommend not using this site or contracting our services.

sections.title: 4. Services
sections.intro: Enigma Developers S.A.C. offers technology services that can be contracted individually or through monthly subscription plans. Services include, among others:
items: Design and development of websites and applications
Server and cloud infrastructure administration
Corporate email implementation and management (Google Workspace)
Cybersecurity audits and protection
Process automation and API integration
Development of custom artificial intelligence agents
Comprehensive technology consulting
sections.outro: The specific scope of each service is detailed in the corresponding commercial proposal or service agreement.

sections.title: 5. Prices and payments
items: The prices of our services are customized according to each client's needs and are clearly communicated in the commercial proposal.
Subscription plans are billed monthly. Payment must be made within the first 5 days of the billing cycle.
We accept bank transfers, card payments, and other methods depending on the client's location.
Prices do not include taxes, unless expressly indicated.

sections.title: 6. Duration and cancellation
items: Subscription plans are monthly and can be canceled at any time without penalty.
Cancellation must be communicated at least 10 days before the next billing cycle.
Individually contracted services are governed by the deadlines established in the corresponding agreement.
In case of cancellation, the client maintains access to their website, data, servers, email, and any development performed.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
sections.intro: Intellectual property is governed by the following rules:
items: Source code, designs, and developments made for the client are the property of the client once the corresponding payment is completed.
The brand, logo, design, and content of the enigmasac.com website are the exclusive property of Enigma Developers S.A.C.
Reusable tools, frameworks, and components developed generically by Enigma Developers S.A.C. may be used in other projects.

sections.title: 8. Client obligations
items: Provide truthful and up-to-date information
Provide the access and credentials necessary for service delivery
Make payments within the agreed deadlines
Not use contracted services for illegal activities
Respect the intellectual property of third parties

sections.title: 9. Limitation of liability
items: Enigma Developers S.A.C. is not responsible for service interruptions caused by third parties, force majeure, or circumstances beyond its control.
The maximum liability of Enigma Developers S.A.C. is limited to the total amount paid by the client in the last 3 months for the affected services.
We are not responsible for content published by the client on their website or platforms.

sections.title: 10. Confidentiality
sections.text: Both parties commit to maintaining the confidentiality of sensitive information shared during the commercial relationship. This obligation remains in effect even after the termination of services.

sections.title: 11. Modifications
sections.text: Enigma Developers S.A.C. reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will be published on this page and, in case of significant changes, active clients will be notified by email.

sections.title: 12. Applicable law
sections.text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Peru. For clients located in the European Union, the consumer protection provisions of the client's country of residence will additionally apply. Any dispute will be resolved before the competent courts of Lima, Peru, unless otherwise agreed between the parties.

sections.title: 13. Contact
sections.text: For inquiries about these terms of service, you can contact us at:

sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
sections.text: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences, improve your browsing experience, and in some cases, collect statistical information about site usage.

subsections.title: Essential cookies
subsections.intro: They are necessary for the basic functioning of the website and cannot be disabled. They include:
items: Session cookies to keep navigation active
Consent cookies to remember your choice about cookie usage
Security cookies to protect against unauthorized access

subsections.title: Analytics cookies
subsections.intro: They allow us to measure and analyze user behavior on our website to improve our services. They include:
items: Number of visitors and most viewed pages
Time spent on each page
Traffic source (search engine, direct link, social media)
Device and browser used

sections.title: 4. Purpose of cookies
sections.intro: The cookies we use have the following purposes:
items: Ensure the correct functioning of the website
Remember user preferences and choices
Collect anonymous statistical information about site usage
Improve the browsing experience and quality of our content
Analyze the performance and effectiveness of our pages

sections.title: 5. Cookie duration
sections.intro: Based on their duration, the cookies we use are classified as:
items: Session cookies: automatically deleted when you close the browser.
Persistent cookies: remain on your device for a specified period or until you manually delete them. Consent cookies are kept for 12 months. Analytics cookies may be kept for up to 24 months.

sections.title: 6. Managing cookies from your browser
sections.intro: You can configure your browser to block, delete, or receive alerts about cookies. Below, we indicate how to do this in the most commonly used browsers:
sections.outro: Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functioning of some website features.

sections.title: 7. Modifications
sections.text: Enigma Developers S.A.C. reserves the right to modify this cookie policy at any time. Updates will be published on this same page with the date of the last update.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.text: If you have questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at:
